55168.title: CNN Special Report
55168.description: Don Lemon reviews the most popular TV theme songs in history with Gary Portnoy of `Cheers', Christopher Knight from 'The Brady Bunch', Fran Drescher from `The Nanny', and the composer of a multitude of black TV theme songs, Kurt Farquhar.

55169.title: Stanley Tucci: Searching for Italy
55169.description: Stanley Tucci visits Sicily. Here, Stanley tries a salty and crunchy sensation, tastes the grapes grown in the region's unique soils, and reflects on the nature of Sicilian hospitality.

55170.title: African Voices Changemakers
55170.description: An exploration of the changemakers in Africa who are coming up with innovative ways to have a positive impact on their communities.

55171.title: Marketplace Africa
55171.description: Offering unique insights into African market's latest information while observing the events and developments that impact the business world.

55172.title: Marketplace Africa
55172.description: A look at the contemporary African art market; given the wide range of applications, satellites are part of the solution when it comes to solving the connectivity gap in Africa.

55173.title: Quest's World of Wonder
55173.description: Perched on the rocky cliffs above a shimmering sea are medieval ramparts, nearly perfectly intact, protecting a gem inside. Exploring the real heart and soul of Dubrovnik in Croatia.

55174.title: Inside Africa
55174.description: Reports on African political and social issues from host Isha Sesay and correspondents across the continent.

55175.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
55175.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes presents the latest news and global events.

55176.description: Highlights and action from the world's sporting competitions.

55177.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes presents the latest news and global events.

55178.description: Live from Atlanta, Robyn Curnow presents the latest news and global events.

55181.title: Early Start
55181.description: An early start with news from Ashleigh Banfield and Zoraida Sambolin.

55182.description: John Berman and Brianna Keilar report the latest news and top stories.

60540.description: A look at the big stories developing as the US markets open, anchored from the floor of the NYSE.

60546.title: Amanpour
60546.description: Peabody Award-winning journalist Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international correspondent, hosts this half-hour weeknight interview program, with each episode focusing on a newsworthy topic and featuring guests, from global leaders to heads of state and cultural icons, who are comfortable challenging conventional wisdom.

60547.title: Hala Gorani Tonight
60547.description: Hala Gorani breaks down the day's news, curating the stories that matter and getting into exactly why they are important.

60549.title: Quest Means Business
60549.description: Richard Quest and a team of correspondents analyze the facts and figures from the business world to help people earn money and spend it wisely.

60550.title: Living Golf
60550.description: Previewing the Olympic golf competition with a look at the history of golf in the Olympic Games. Plus, a look at Japan's unique golfing culture.

60551.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
60551.description: CNN's chief Washington correspondent, Jake Tapper, hosts this hour-long weekday afternoon program, which covers all the day's top stories from around the country and the world, headlines that span politics, money, sports and popular culture. `The Lead' works to ensure that viewers are caught up on the stories that matter, often highlighting news that may have been overlooked. Prior to joining CNN, Tapper served as senior White House correspondent at ABC News.

60552.title: The Lead with Jake Tapper
60552.description: Jake Tapper covers all the day's top stories around the country and the globe, from politics to money, sports to popular culture.
